perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts at Kamogawa Sea World where a large crowd is seated in a stadium. An orca leaps and splashes water, drenching a woman and a child wearing blue raincoats. (2) Transition to a career experience center where two boys are dressing up in uniforms, including pilot and firefighter gear. They are seen using equipment like VR headsets and microphones in a recording studio setup. (3) The scene moves to an outdoor amusement park and outlet mall. A man in a white t-shirt and black hat attempts a ball-toss game and fails, followed by him struggling with a claw machine. The video concludes with the boys making funny faces and reacting to the games.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy upbeat background music starts immediately. Sounds of water splashing and a crowd cheering loudly are heard as the orca jumps. A female voice shouts in excitement. (2) The music continues as a transition to indoor dialogue. A male voice narrates playfully while children's voices are heard responding and role-playing. Studio recording effects and mechanical beeps from games are audible. (3) The acoustic environment shifts to an outdoor park with ambient wind and distant chatter. The male host laughs loudly and shouts in a comedic, frustrated tone after failing a game. The music reaches a crescendo and then ends with a short sound effect.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '鴨川海洋公園 SeaWorld' (Title). Decorative Text: '大浪攻擊' (Big wave attack) appearing with a splash effect. (2) Functional Text: 'Kandu 兒童職業體驗城' (Kandu Children's Career Experience City). Functional Text: '阿波嚇哭了' (A-Bo is scared to tears), '自己就會穿衣服' (Can dress himself now). (3) Functional Text: '木更津 Kisarapea 樂園' (Kisarazu Kisarapea Park). Hook Text: '全日本最大 OUTLET' (Largest Outlet in Japan). (4) Emotional Text: '綜藝之神降臨啦' (The god of variety shows has descended) used when the host fails at a game.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (Sea World) -> Experience (Kids' Center) -> Entertainment (Outlet & Games)

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 4 main family members (2 adults, 2 kids), plus dozens of stadium spectators and park staff.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male (white t-shirt, black cap), an adult female (beige top), and two young boys (varying outfits including uniforms).

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Outdoor aquatic stadium with an orca tank; indoor career theme park with colorful booths; outdoor shopping mall with game stalls and a ferris wheel in the distance.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight and bright indoor studio lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location A -> Location B -> Location C -> Reaction
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document and share a family travel vlog in Japan, showcasing fun-filled family activities, humorous personal failures at games, and the children's learning experiences at a career center.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy comedic narration, family-centric content, and variety-show style editing with heavy text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a very standard Taiwanese social media influencer editing style, characterized by fast cuts and emotional text pop-ups to maintain high viewer engagement.
